description: Image understanding for AI agents — analyze and describe any image via the three.ws pipeline.
name: io.github.nirholas/vision-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the three.ws API that serves the vision endpoint. Override only when self-hosting or targeting a preview deployment.
environmentVariables.name: THREE_WS_BASE

environmentVariables.description: Per-request timeout in milliseconds for the vision call (the VLM may chain across free lanes before answering).
environmentVariables.name: THREE_WS_TIMEOUT_MS

environmentVariables.description: Optional three.ws API key (bearer token). Not required — the vision endpoint serves anonymous callers on a free per-IP rate limit. Set it to raise your rate limit to the per-user tier. Never needed to access the free model.
environmentVariables.name: THREE_WS_API_KEY

title: three.ws Vision
